name: rad-session
description: Three-phase Claude Code workflow lifecycle: /init bootstraps a project once (deterministic stack detection via Python scripts, CLAUDE.md scaffold, rad-* plugin recommendations), /startup orients each session (parallel-batched resource discovery, stale-handoff auto-refresh from git log, scoped to current state), /wrapup captures each session (structured HANDOFF.md with 'what NOT to do' field, CLAUDE.md prune with diff confirmation and Resources protection, auto-proceed for low-risk prunes), /add-resource registers tools any time. Two Python scripts (detect-stack.py, detect-resources.py) make stack and MCP detection deterministic. PreCompact hook prevents silent context loss. 3.0 absorbs and replaces the retired rad-stack-guide.
